component.name: FluxTuner
component.summary: Modern internet radio player with GTK and terminal interfaces

description.p: FluxTuner is a lightweight internet radio player featuring both a modern GTK4 graphical interface and a fast Textual terminal interface.
Browse and play thousands of internet radio stations with support for:

ul.li: Favorites and custom tags
Dynamic playlists
Live stream metadata
Theme support
Estimated data usage tracking
Multiple playback backends with automatic detection and compatibility checks

description.p: FluxTuner is designed to work well both on modern desktop environments and lightweight Linux systems.

screenshot.caption: Search and play internet radio stations
Fast terminal interface powered by Textual

ul.li: Added the authenticated Web dashboard with user library metrics and admin server metrics.
Added public pending account requests with administrator approval or rejection.
Hardened Web authentication, URL handling, input validation and private search access.
Expanded CI and release checks to validate mypy across the full package.
Refined Web UI navigation, station actions and light/dark theme polish.
Added Web/server local accounts with first-run administrator setup.
Added authenticated Web library access, CSRF-protected mutations and admin user management.
Improved Web UI navigation, browser playback layout and light/dark theme switching.
Updated licensing documentation for the MIT core and non-commercial Web/server components.
Added multi-profile support for favorites, playback history and manual playlists.
Added persistent active profile commands and profile-aware CLI import/export.
Textual TUI, GTK GUI and Web mode now use the persisted active profile.
Web API endpoints now support a per-request profile override with ?profile=NAME.
Updated documentation and architecture notes for the new profile-scoped library model.
Adds internal profile-aware storage for favorites, history and playlists.
Adds a CLI command to inspect known profiles.
Keeps the default profile behavior unchanged.
Moved favorites, playback history and manual playlists to a local SQLite library database.
Added conservative migration from legacy JSON library files.
Prepared the storage model for profile-aware features while keeping the default-profile workflow unchanged.
Updated release metadata for FluxTuner 0.6.0.
Improved shared data directory handling for isolated app data and container workflows.
Added source-level web/server mode documentation and packaging notes.
Improved project documentation for web, container and multi-interface usage.
Kept the Flatpak package focused on the GTK and terminal interfaces.
Added a Textual TUI keyboard shortcuts help modal, available with the ? key.
Reduced visible TUI footer shortcuts to the most important actions.
Made the shortcuts help content scrollable for smaller terminals.
Improved the first-run terminal experience with a cleaner main interface.
Updated release metadata for FluxTuner 0.5.0.
Added player capability declarations and compatibility checks for specialized playback backends.
Added lightweight mpg123 and ogg123 backend support alongside mpv and ffplay.
Improved backend diagnostics with richer list-players output, install hints and a new doctor command.
Improved TUI, GTK GUI and legacy CLI behavior when specialized backends are selected.
Updated documentation, Flatpak notes and AppStream metadata for the expanded backend model.
Completed the technical hardening roadmap with improved CI, security checks and dependency auditing.
Added shared search service, structured debug logging and gradual typing checks.
Improved persistence safety, import validation, network failure handling and metadata limits.
Reviewed Flatpak permissions and split TUI table, detail and theme helpers into dedicated modules.
Fixed TUI station details rendering and side-panel layout after line breaks.
Improved GTK GUI side-panel navigation by grouping Favorites and History under a Library section.
Improved GTK GUI status messages for search, favorites, history and tag playlist views.
Added a History view to the GTK GUI, matching the existing TUI history flow.
Fixed GTK GUI playback history persistence so played stations are available from the shared history.
Stabilized player backend handling for mpv and ffplay.
Improved TUI playback, favorites, playlists and history behavior.
Improved GUI backend capability handling.
Updated Flatpak packaging metadata.
Added Flatpak support with GUI and TUI launchers.
Improved GTK and Textual feature parity.
Added automatic playback backend detection.
Improved favorites, tags and playlist management.
Improved metadata and data usage tracking.
